title: What is ZX Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: What is ZX Evangelion             Quote Post by Zeruel » Tue Mar 09, 2010 4:42 pm I see it on torrent websites and other things but cant find any info for it, so What is it?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Mar 09, 2010 5:06 pm It's a fansub group. zx is short for "Zhentarim DivX" .
